/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/mvgal.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libmvgal.so -o libmvgal.so CMakeFiles/mvgal.dir/api/mvgal_api.o CMakeFiles/mvgal.dir/api/mvgal_log.o CMakeFiles/mvgal.dir/daemon/gpu_manager.o CMakeFiles/mvgal.dir/daemon/config.o CMakeFiles/mvgal.dir/daemon/ipc.o CMakeFiles/mvgal.dir/execution/execution.o CMakeFiles/mvgal.dir/memory/memory.o CMakeFiles/mvgal.dir/memory/dmabuf.o CMakeFiles/mvgal.dir/memory/allocator.o CMakeFiles/mvgal.dir/memory/sync.o CMakeFiles/mvgal.dir/scheduler/scheduler.o CMakeFiles/mvgal.dir/scheduler/load_balancer.o CMakeFiles/mvgal.dir/scheduler/workload_splitter.o CMakeFiles/mvgal.dir/scheduler/strategy/afr.o CMakeFiles/mvgal.dir/scheduler/strategy/sfr.o CMakeFiles/mvgal.dir/scheduler/strategy/task.o CMakeFiles/mvgal.dir/scheduler/strategy/compute_offload.o CMakeFiles/mvgal.dir/scheduler/strategy/hybrid.o   -L/home/axogm/Documents/Driver/new/mvgal/src/userspace/build_userspace  libmvgal_core.a -lThreads::Threads -lm
